summary: Any Minute Timesheet App Phase 1 MVP comprehensive testing completed. Backend APIs 100% working. Frontend pages all functional. Fixed Dashboard.js auth headers and business dropdown label issues.
passed_tests: Auth: User registration creates new tenant/user
Auth: First user in tenant becomes admin
Auth: Login with valid credentials returns token
Auth: Invalid credentials rejected (401)
Auth: Get current user excludes password_hash
Business CRUD: Create business with name, address, contact
Business CRUD: Get all businesses for tenant
Business CRUD: Get single business by ID
Business CRUD: Update business details
Business CRUD: Soft delete business (sets active=false)
User Management: Create user with role assignment
User Management: Create user with employee_mapping_key
User Management: Get users list (excludes password_hash)
User Management: Update user role
Timesheet: Create timesheet week (Saturday start)
Timesheet: Create entry with start/end time and break minutes
Timesheet: Net hours calculation (9.25h for 10h - 45min break)
Timesheet: Update entry recalculates net hours
Timesheet: Submit timesheet for approval
Timesheet: Approve submitted timesheet
Schedule: Create schedule entry for user
Schedule: Get schedules with date range filter
Schedule: Update schedule times
Schedule: Delete schedule entry
Reports: Get report by business with user breakdown
Tenant Settings: Get payroll API key
Tenant Settings: Regenerate payroll API key
Payroll Integration: GET /api/am/payroll/employees with X-PAYROLL-KEY
Payroll Integration: GET /api/am/payroll/approved-entries with date range
Payroll Integration: POST /api/am/payroll/lock to lock approved entries
Payroll Integration: Invalid/missing API key rejected (401)
Dashboard Stats: Returns business_count, user_count, pending_approvals
Frontend: Login page loads with email/password fields
Frontend: Signup page with account type selection and form
Frontend: Timesheet weekly grid with Saturday start
Frontend: Schedule page with weekly calendar view
Frontend: Reports page with filters and generate button
Frontend: Settings page with API key copy/regenerate
Frontend: Add Business page with comprehensive form
Frontend: Add User page with role assignment
Frontend: Edit User page with user table

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages functional, fixed Dashboard auth issues)

seed_data_creation: Created test timesheet entry for Toronto Office with 9.25 hours, approved status
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend APIs 100% tested. Frontend Dashboard fix applied - auth headers and business dropdown label corrected. Week starts on Saturday as per BRD requirement - verified working. Test credentials: admin@anyminute.com / admin123

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Dashboard.js made axios requests without Authorization header while backend endpoints require authentication
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added token from useAMAuth() hook and included Authorization header in all axios calls. Also fixed business dropdown to use 'name' field instead of 'company_name'
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Dashboard now loads businesses correctly and displays stats without errors
